data.template.app-created:
googlechat:
  cardsV2: |
    - header:
        title: {{ .app.metadata.name }} has been created 🆕
      sections:
        - widgets:
            - decoratedText:
                topLabel: Repository
                text: {{ call .repo.RepoURLToHTTPS .app.spec.source.repoURL }}
            - decoratedText:
                topLabel: Revision
                text: {{ .app.spec.source.targetRevision }}
            - decoratedText:
                topLabel: Author
                text: {{ (call .repo.GetCommitMetadata .app.status.sync.revision).Author }}
            - decoratedText:
                topLabel: Commit
                text: "{{ (call .strings.ReplaceAll (call .repo.GetCommitMetadata .app.status.sync.revision).Message "\n" " | ") }}"
            - buttonList:
                buttons:
                  - text: View in ArgoCD
                    onClick:
                      openLink:
                        url: {{ .context.argocdUrl }}/applications/{{ .app.metadata.name }}

data.trigger.on-created:
- description: Application is created.
  oncePer: app.metadata.name
  send:
  - app-created
  when: "true"
data.trigger.on-deleted:
- description: Application is deleted.
  oncePer: app.metadata.name
  send:
  - app-deleted
  when: app.metadata.deletionTimestamp != nil
data.trigger.on-deployed:
- description: Application is synced and healthy. Triggered once per commit.
  oncePer: app.status.operationState?.syncResult?.revision
  send:
  - app-deployed
  when: app.status.operationState != nil and app.status.operationState.phase in ['Succeeded']
    and app.status.health.status == 'Healthy'
data.trigger.on-health-degraded:
- description: Application has degraded
  send:
  - app-health-degraded
  when: app.status.health.status == 'Degraded'
data.trigger.on-out-of-sync:
- description: Application is out of sync
  send:
  - app-out-of-sync
  when: app.status.sync.status == 'OutOfSync'
data.trigger.on-sync-failed:
- description: Application syncing has failed
  send:
  - app-sync-failed
  when: app.status.operationState != nil and app.status.operationState.phase in ['Error', 'Failed']
data.trigger.on-sync-running:
- description: Application is being synced
  send:
  - app-sync-running
  when: app.status.operationState != nil and app.status.operationState.phase in ['Running']
data.trigger.on-sync-status-unknown:
- description: Application status is 'Unknown'
  send:
  - app-sync-status-unknown
  when: app.status.sync.status == 'Unknown'
data.trigger.on-sync-succeeded:
- description: Application syncing has succeeded
  send:
  - app-sync-succeeded
  when: app.status.operationState != nil and app.status.operationState.phase in ['Succeeded']

metadata.name: argocd
metadata.notes:
In order to access the server UI you have the following options:

1. kubectl port-forward service/argocd-server -n operator 8080:443

    and then open the browser on http://localhost:8080 and accept the certificate

2. enable ingress in the values file `server.ingress.enabled` and either
      - Add the annotation for ssl passthrough: https://argo-cd.readthedocs.io/en/stable/operator-manual/ingress/#option-1-ssl-passthrough
      - Set the `configs.params."server.insecure"` in the values file and terminate SSL at your ingress: https://argo-cd.readthedocs.io/en/stable/operator-manual/ingress/#option-2-multiple-ingress-objects-and-hosts


After reaching the UI the first time you can login with username: admin and the random password generated during the installation. You can find the password by running:

kubectl -n operator get secret argocd-initial-admin-secret -o jsonpath="{.data.password}" | base64 -d

(You should delete the initial secret afterwards as suggested by the Getting Started Guide: https://argo-cd.readthedocs.io/en/stable/getting_started/#4-login-using-the-cli)

values.name: argocd
values:
"controller":
  "metrics":
    "enabled": true
    "serviceMonitor":
      "additionalLabels":
        "release": "kube-prometheus-stack"
      "enabled": true
      "namespace": "monitoring"
"dex":
  "image":
    "repository": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1/dexidp/dex"
    "tag": "v2.42.1"
"exporter":
  "image":
    "repository": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1/oliver006/redis_exporter"
    "tag": "v1.71.0"
"extensions":
  "image":
    "repository": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1/argoprojlabs/argocd-extension-installer"
    "tag": "v0.0.8"
"global":
  "image":
    "repository": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1/argoproj/argocd"
    "tag": "v3.0.0"
  "nodeSelector":
    "cloud.google.com/gke-nodepool": "np-tdv-operator-dev-mec1"
    "topology.kubernetes.io/region": "me-central1"
"redis":
  "image":
    "repository": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1/docker/library/redis"
    "tag": "7.2.8-alpine"
"redis-ha":
  "exporter":
    "image": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1/oliver006/redis_exporter"
    "tag": "v1.71.0"
  "image":
    "repository": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1/docker/library/redis"
    "tag": "7.2.8-alpine"
"redisSecretInit":
  "image":
    "repository": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1/argoproj/argocd"
    "tag": "v3.0.0"
"server":
  "containerPorts":
    "server": 4041
  "metrics":
    "enabled": true
    "serviceMonitor":
      "additionalLabels":
        "release": "kube-prometheus-stack"
      "enabled": true
      "namespace": "monitoring"

values.name: authentication-portal-dev
values:
"applications":
  "authentication-portal-dev":
    "additionalAnnotations":
      "argocd-image-updater.argoproj.io/authentication-portal.allow-tags": "regexp:dev\\.snapshot\\..*"
      "argocd-image-updater.argoproj.io/authentication-portal.helm.image-tag": "authentication-portal.image.tag"
      "argocd-image-updater.argoproj.io/authentication-portal.update-strategy": "newest-build"
      "argocd-image-updater.argoproj.io/image-list": "authentication-portal=me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-app-hub-mec1/dev/authentication-portal"
      "argocd-image-updater.argoproj.io/write-back-method": "git:secret:operator/helm-repository-credentials"
      "notifications.argoproj.io/subscribe.on-deleted.googlechat": "devchat"
      "notifications.argoproj.io/subscribe.on-health-degraded.googlechat": "devchat"
      "notifications.argoproj.io/subscribe.on-sync-failed.googlechat": "devchat"
      "notifications.argoproj.io/subscribe.on-sync-status-unknown.googlechat": "devchat"
    "destination":
      "name": "in-cluster"
      "namespace": "dev"
    "finalizers":
    - "resources-finalizer.argocd.argoproj.io"
    "ignoreDifferences":
    - "group": "external-secrets.io/v1beta1"
      "jqPathExpressions":
      - ".spec.data[].remoteRef.conversionStrategy"
      - ".spec.data[].remoteRef.decodingStrategy"
      - ".spec.data[].remoteRef.metadataPolicy"
      "kind": "ExternalSecret"
    "namespace": "operator"
    "project": "default"
    "source":
      "helm":
        "releaseName": "authentication-portal-dev"
        "valueFiles":
        - "values-dev.yaml"
        "valuesObject":
          "authentication-portal":
            "deployment":
              "nodeSelector":
                "cloud.google.com/gke-nodepool": "np-tdv-application-dev-mec1"
                "topology.kubernetes.io/region": "me-central1"
            "image":
              "registry": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-app-hub-mec1/dev"
              "repository": "authentication-portal"
          "global":
            "certManager":
              "enabled": false
            "externalSecrets":
              "enabled": true
              "secretStoreRef":
                "kind": "ClusterSecretStore"
                "name": "external-secrets"
            "istio":
              "enabled": true
              "gatewaySelector": "ingressgateway"
              "namespace": "networking"
            "metrics":
              "enabled": true
              "prometheus":
                "namespace": "monitoring"
                "release": "kube-prometheus-stack"
      "path": "applications/authentication-portal"
      "repoURL": "https://bitbucket.org/paladinanalytics/tdv-helm"
      "targetRevision": "argocd/dev"
    "syncPolicy":
      "automated":
        "allowEmpty": false
        "prune": true
        "selfHeal": true
      "retry":
        "backoff":
          "duration": "5s"
          "factor": 2
          "maxDuration": "5m"
        "limit": 5
      "syncOptions":
      - "Validate=true"
      - "CreateNamespace=false"
      - "PrunePropagationPolicy=foreground"
      - "PruneLast=true"
      - "Replace=false"
      - "RespectIgnoreDifferences=true"
      - "Retry=false"
      - "ServerSideApply=false"

values.name: argocd-image-updater
values:
"applications":
  "argocd-image-updater":
    "additionalAnnotations": {}
    "destination":
      "name": "in-cluster"
      "namespace": "operator"
    "finalizers":
    - "resources-finalizer.argocd.argoproj.io"
    "ignoreDifferences": []
    "namespace": "operator"
    "project": "default"
    "source":
      "helm":
        "releaseName": "argocd-image-updater"
        "valueFiles": []
        "valuesObject":
          "argocdimageupdater":
            "authScripts":
              "enabled": true
              "scripts":
                "gke-workload-identity-auth.sh": |
                  #!/bin/sh
                  ACCESS_TOKEN=$(wget --header 'Metadata-Flavor: Google' http://metadata.google.internal/computeMetadata/v1/instance/service-accounts/default/token -q -O - | grep -Eo '"access_token":.*?[^\\]",' | cut -d '"' -f 4)
                  echo "oauth2accesstoken:$ACCESS_TOKEN"
            "config":
              "gitCommitMail": "argo-image-updater@tdv.helm"
              "registries":
              - "api_url": "https://me-central1-docker.pkg.dev"
                "credentials": "ext:/scripts/gke-workload-identity-auth.sh"
                "credsexpire": "30m"
                "name": "GCP Artifact Registry"
                "prefix": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev"
            "image":
              "repository": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1/argoprojlabs/argocd-image-updater"
              "tag": "v0.16.0"
            "metrics":
              "enabled": true
              "serviceMonitor":
                "additionalLabels":
                  "release": "kube-prometheus-stack"
                "enabled": true
                "namespace": "monitoring"
            "nodeSelector":
              "cloud.google.com/gke-nodepool": "np-tdv-operator-dev-mec1"
              "topology.kubernetes.io/region": "me-central1"
            "serviceAccount":
              "annotations":
                "iam.gke.io/gcp-service-account": "tdv-argocdimageupdater-dev@mcit-tdv-dev-spoke.iam.gserviceaccount.com"
              "create": true
              "name": "argocd-image-updater"
      "path": "charts/argocd-image-updater"
      "repoURL": "https://bitbucket.org/paladinanalytics/tdv-helm"
      "targetRevision": "argocd/dev"
    "syncPolicy":
      "automated":
        "allowEmpty": false
        "prune": true
        "selfHeal": true
      "retry":
        "backoff":
          "duration": "5s"
          "factor": 2
          "maxDuration": "5m"
        "limit": 5
      "syncOptions":
      - "Validate=true"
      - "CreateNamespace=false"
      - "PrunePropagationPolicy=foreground"
      - "PruneLast=true"
      - "Replace=false"
      - "RespectIgnoreDifferences=true"
      - "Retry=false"
      - "ServerSideApply=false"

eck-operator
values:
"applications":
  "eck-operator":
    "additionalAnnotations": {}
    "destination":
      "name": "in-cluster"
      "namespace": "operator"
    "finalizers":
    - "resources-finalizer.argocd.argoproj.io"
    "ignoreDifferences":
    - "jsonPointers":
      - "/metadata/labels"
      "kind": "Secret"
    "namespace": "operator"
    "project": "default"
    "source":
      "helm":
        "releaseName": "eck-operator"
        "valueFiles": []
        "valuesObject":
          "elasticsearch":
            "name": "elasticsearch"
            "namespace": "dev"
            "spec":
              "auth":
                "fileRealm":
                - "secretName": "elasticsearch-credentials"
              "http":
                "tls":
                  "selfSignedCertificate":
                    "disabled": true
              "image": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:8.17.3"
              "nodeSets":
              - "config":
                  "node.roles":
                  - "master"
                "count": 1
                "name": "master"
                "podTemplate":
                  "spec":
                    "automountServiceAccountToken": true
                    "initContainers":
                    - "command":
                      - "sh"
                      - "-c"
                      - "sysctl -w vm.max_map_count=262144"
                      "name": "sysctl"
                      "securityContext":
                        "privileged": true
                        "runAsUser": 0
                    "nodeSelector":
                      "cloud.google.com/gke-nodepool": "np-tdv-application-dev-mec1"
                      "topology.kubernetes.io/region": "me-central1"
                    "serviceAccountName": "elastic"
                "volumeClaimTemplates":
                - "metadata":
                    "name": "elasticsearch-data"
                  "spec":
                    "accessModes":
                    - "ReadWriteOnce"
                    "resources":
                      "requests":
                        "storage": "10Gi"
                    "storageClassName": "standard"
              - "config":
                  "node.roles":
                  - "data"
                  - "ingest"
                  - "transform"
                "count": 2
                "name": "data"
                "podTemplate":
                  "spec":
                    "automountServiceAccountToken": true
                    "initContainers":
                    - "command":
                      - "sh"
                      - "-c"
                      - "sysctl -w vm.max_map_count=262144"
                      "name": "sysctl"
                      "securityContext":
                        "privileged": true
                        "runAsUser": 0
                    "nodeSelector":
                      "cloud.google.com/gke-nodepool": "np-tdv-application-dev-mec1"
                      "topology.kubernetes.io/region": "me-central1"
                    "serviceAccountName": "elastic"
                "volumeClaimTemplates":
                - "metadata":
                    "name": "elasticsearch-data"
                  "spec":
                    "accessModes":
                    - "ReadWriteOnce"
                    "resources":
                      "requests":
                        "storage": "25Gi"
                    "storageClassName": "standard"
              "podDisruptionBudget":
                "spec":
                  "minAvailable": 2
                  "selector":
                    "matchLabels":
                      "elasticsearch.k8s.elastic.co/cluster-name": "elasticsearch"
              "version": "8.17.3"
          "kibana":
            "name": "kibana"
            "namespace": "monitoring"
            "spec":
              "count": 1
              "elasticsearchRef":
                "name": "elasticsearch"
                "namespace": "dev"
              "http":
                "tls":
                  "selfSignedCertificate":
                    "disabled": true
              "image": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1/kibana/kibana:8.17.3"
              "podTemplate":
                "spec":
                  "nodeSelector":
                    "cloud.google.com/gke-nodepool": "np-tdv-monitoring-dev-mec1"
                    "topology.kubernetes.io/region": "me-central1"
              "version": "8.17.3"
          "operator":
            "createClusterScopedResource": true
            "image":
              "repository": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1/eck/eck-operator"
              "tag": "3.0.0"
            "installCRDs": true
            "managedNamespaces": []
            "nodeSelector":
              "cloud.google.com/gke-nodepool": "np-tdv-operator-dev-mec1"
              "topology.kubernetes.io/region": "me-central1"
            "podAnnotations":
              "sidecar.istio.io/inject": "true"
              "traffic.sidecar.istio.io/excludeInboundPorts": "9443"
              "traffic.sidecar.istio.io/includeInboundPorts": "*"
            "podMonitor":
              "enabled": true
              "labels":
                "release": "kube-prometheus-stack"
            "webhook":
              "enabled": true
      "path": "charts/eck-operator"
      "repoURL": "https://bitbucket.org/paladinanalytics/tdv-helm"
      "targetRevision": "argocd/dev"
    "syncPolicy":
      "automated":
        "allowEmpty": false
        "prune": true
        "selfHeal": true
      "retry":
        "backoff":
          "duration": "5s"
          "factor": 2
          "maxDuration": "5m"
        "limit": 5
      "syncOptions":
      - "Validate=true"
      - "CreateNamespace=false"
      - "PrunePropagationPolicy=foreground"
      - "PruneLast=true"
      - "Replace=false"
      - "RespectIgnoreDifferences=true"
      - "Retry=false"
      - "ServerSideApply=false"

istio
values:
"applications":
  "istio":
    "additionalAnnotations": {}
    "destination":
      "name": "in-cluster"
      "namespace": "networking"
    "finalizers":
    - "resources-finalizer.argocd.argoproj.io"
    "ignoreDifferences":
    - "group": "admissionregistration.k8s.io"
      "jqPathExpressions":
      - ".webhooks[].namespaceSelector.matchExpressions[] | select(.key == \"control-plane\")"
      - ".webhooks[].namespaceSelector.matchExpressions[] | select(.key == \"kubernetes.azure.com/managedby\")"
      "kind": "MutatingWebhookConfiguration"
    - "group": "admissionregistration.k8s.io"
      "jqPathExpressions":
      - ".webhooks[].failurePolicy"
      "kind": "ValidatingWebhookConfiguration"
    - "group": "admissionregistration.k8s.io"
      "jqPathExpressions":
      - ".webhooks[].failurePolicy"
      "kind": "ValidatingWebhookConfiguration"
    - "group": "apps"
      "jqPathExpressions":
      - ".spec.template.spec.containers[].env[].valueFrom.resourceFieldRef.divisor"
      - ".spec.template.spec.initContainers[].env[].valueFrom.resourceFieldRef.divisor"
      "kind": "Deployment"
    "namespace": "operator"
    "project": "default"
    "source":
      "helm":
        "releaseName": "istio"
        "valueFiles": []
        "valuesObject":
          "base":
            "enabled": true
            "global":
              "istioNamespace": "networking"
          "gateway":
            "autoscaling":
              "enabled": true
              "maxReplicas": 20
              "minReplicas": 2
              "targetCPUUtilizationPercentage": 80
            "enabled": true
            "labels":
              "istio": "ingressgateway"
            "nodeSelector":
              "cloud.google.com/gke-nodepool": "np-tdv-networking-dev-mec1"
              "topology.kubernetes.io/region": "me-central1"
            "service":
              "annotations":
                "cloud.google.com/neg": "{\"exposed_ports\":{\"80\":{\"name\":\"tdv-istio-dev\"}}}"
              "loadBalancerIP": ""
              "ports":
              - "name": "status-port"
                "nodePort": null
                "port": 15021
                "protocol": "TCP"
                "targetPort": 15021
              - "name": "http2"
                "nodePort": null
                "port": 80
                "protocol": "TCP"
                "targetPort": 80
              - "name": "https"
                "nodePort": null
                "port": 443
                "protocol": "TCP"
                "targetPort": 443
              "type": "ClusterIP"
            "topologySpreadConstraints": []
          "istiod":
            "autoscaleEnabled": true
            "autoscaleMin": 2
            "enabled": true
            "global":
              "defaultNodeSelector":
                "cloud.google.com/gke-nodepool": "np-tdv-networking-dev-mec1"
                "topology.kubernetes.io/region": "me-central1"
              "hub": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1/istio/pilot"
              "istioNamespace": "networking"
              "proxy":
                "image": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1/istio/proxyv2:1.26.0"
                "tracer": "zipkin"
              "proxy_init":
                "image": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1/istio/proxyv2:1.26.0"
              "tag": "1.26.0"
            "image": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1/istio/pilot:1.26.0"
            "meshConfig":
              "defaultConfig":
                "holdApplicationUntilProxyStarts": true
                "tracing":
                  "zipkin":
                    "address": "tempo.monitoring.svc.cluster.local:9411"
              "defaultProviders":
                "metrics":
                - "prometheus"
                "tracing":
                - "zipkin"
              "enablePrometheusMerge": true
              "enableTracing": true
              "extensionProviders":
              - "name": "zipkin"
                "zipkin":
                  "port": 9411
                  "service": "tempo.monitoring.svc.cluster.local"
            "nodeSelector":
              "cloud.google.com/gke-nodepool": "np-tdv-networking-dev-mec1"
              "topology.kubernetes.io/region": "me-central1"
            "proxy":
              "enableTracing": true
            "replicaCount": 2
            "traceSampling": 100
          "metrics":
            "enabled": true
            "prometheus":
              "namespace": "monitoring"
              "release": "kube-prometheus-stack"
          "mtls":
            "enabled": true
            "namespace":
            - "networking"
      "path": "charts/istio"
      "repoURL": "https://bitbucket.org/paladinanalytics/tdv-helm"
      "targetRevision": "argocd/dev"
    "syncPolicy":
      "automated":
        "allowEmpty": false
        "prune": true
        "selfHeal": true
      "retry":
        "backoff":
          "duration": "5s"
          "factor": 2
          "maxDuration": "5m"
        "limit": 5
      "syncOptions":
      - "Validate=true"
      - "CreateNamespace=false"
      - "PrunePropagationPolicy=foreground"
      - "PruneLast=true"
      - "Replace=false"
      - "RespectIgnoreDifferences=true"
      - "Retry=false"
      - "ServerSideApply=false"

values:
"applications":
  "loki":
    "additionalAnnotations": {}
    "destination":
      "name": "in-cluster"
      "namespace": "monitoring"
    "finalizers":
    - "resources-finalizer.argocd.argoproj.io"
    "ignoreDifferences":
    - "jsonPointers":
      - "/metadata/annotations"
      "kind": "Service"
      "name": "loki"
      "namespace": "monitoring"
    - "jsonPointers":
      - "/metadata/annotations"
      "kind": "Service"
      "name": "loki-canary"
      "namespace": "monitoring"
    - "jsonPointers":
      - "/metadata/annotations"
      "kind": "Service"
      "name": "loki-headless"
      "namespace": "monitoring"
    - "jsonPointers":
      - "/metadata/annotations"
      "kind": "Service"
      "name": "loki-memberlist"
      "namespace": "monitoring"
    - "jsonPointers":
      - "/metadata/annotations"
      "kind": "Service"
      "name": "loki-results-cache"
      "namespace": "monitoring"
    - "jsonPointers":
      - "/metadata/annotations"
      "kind": "Service"
      "name": "loki-gateway"
      "namespace": "monitoring"
    "namespace": "operator"
    "project": "default"
    "source":
      "helm":
        "releaseName": "loki"
        "valueFiles": []
        "valuesObject":
          "loki":
            "backend":
              "replicas": 0
            "bloomCompactor":
              "replicas": 0
            "bloomGateway":
              "replicas": 0
            "chunksCache":
              "allocatedMemory": 1024
              "enabled": false
              "nodeSelector":
                "cloud.google.com/gke-nodepool": "np-tdv-monitoring-dev-mec1"
                "topology.kubernetes.io/region": "me-central1"
              "writebackSizeLimit": "500MB"
            "deploymentMode": "SingleBinary"
            "distributor":
              "replicas": 0
            "gateway":
              "image":
                "registry": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1"
                "repository": "nginxinc/nginx-unprivileged"
                "tag": "1.27-alpine"
              "nodeSelector":
                "cloud.google.com/gke-nodepool": "np-tdv-monitoring-dev-mec1"
                "topology.kubernetes.io/region": "me-central1"
            "indexGateway":
              "replicas": 0
            "ingester":
              "replicas": 0
            "loki":
              "commonConfig":
                "replication_factor": 1
              "compactor":
                "delete_request_store": "gcs"
                "retention_delete_delay": "2h"
                "retention_delete_worker_count": 150
                "retention_enabled": true
                "working_directory": "/tmp/retention"
              "image":
                "registry": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1"
                "repository": "grafana/loki"
                "tag": "3.4.2"
              "ingester":
                "chunk_encoding": "snappy"
              "limits_config":
                "allow_structured_metadata": true
                "max_query_lookback": "720h"
                "retention_period": "720h"
                "volume_enabled": true
              "pattern_ingestor":
                "enabled": true
              "schemaConfig":
                "configs":
                - "chunks":
                    "period": "24h"
                    "prefix": "loki_chunks_"
                  "from": "2025-01-01"
                  "index":
                    "period": "24h"
                    "prefix": "loki_index_"
                  "object_store": "gcs"
                  "schema": "v13"
                  "store": "tsdb"
              "storage":
                "bucketNames":
                  "chunks": "sb-tdv-loki-dev-mec1"
                "gcs":
                  "chunkBufferSize": 0
                  "enableHttp2": true
                  "requestTimeout": "0s"
                "object_storage":
                  "bucket_name": "sb-tdv-loki-dev-mec1"
                  "service_account": "tdv-loki-dev@mcit-tdv-dev-spoke.iam.gserviceaccount.com"
                "type": "gcs"
              "tracing":
                "enabled": true
            "lokiCanary":
              "image":
                "registry": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1"
                "repository": "grafana/loki-canary"
                "tag": "3.4.2"
            "memcached":
              "image":
                "repository": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1/memcached"
                "tag": "1.6.38-alpine"
            "memcachedExporter":
              "image":
                "repository": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1/prom/memcached-exporter"
                "tag": "v0.15.2"
            "minio":
              "enabled": false
            "monitoring":
              "serviceMonitor":
                "enabled": true
                "labels":
                  "release": "kube-prometheus-stack"
            "querier":
              "replicas": 0
            "queryFrontend":
              "replicas": 0
            "queryScheduler":
              "replicas": 0
            "read":
              "replicas": 0
            "resultsCache":
              "nodeSelector":
                "cloud.google.com/gke-nodepool": "np-tdv-monitoring-dev-mec1"
                "topology.kubernetes.io/region": "me-central1"
              "podDisruptionBudget":
                "maxUnavailable": 1
            "serviceAccount":
              "annotations":
                "iam.gke.io/gcp-service-account": "tdv-loki-dev@mcit-tdv-dev-spoke.iam.gserviceaccount.com"
              "create": true
              "labels": null
              "name": "loki"
            "sidecar":
              "image":
                "repository": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1/kiwigrid/k8s-sidecar"
                "tag": "1.30.0"
            "singleBinary":
              "autoscaling":
                "enabled": true
                "maxReplicas": 6
                "minReplicas": 2
              "extraEnv":
              - "name": "GOMEMLIMIT"
                "value": "3750MiB"
              "image":
                "registry": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1"
                "repository": "grafana/loki"
                "tag": "3.4.2"
              "nodeSelector":
                "cloud.google.com/gke-nodepool": "np-tdv-monitoring-dev-mec1"
                "topology.kubernetes.io/region": "me-central1"
              "persistence":
                "enabled": true
                "storageClassName": "default"
              "podAnnotations":
                "iam.gke.io/gcp-service-account": "tdv-loki-dev@mcit-tdv-dev-spoke.iam.gserviceaccount.com"
              "podLabels": {}
              "resources":
                "limits":
                  "cpu": "300m"
                  "memory": "4Gi"
                "requests":
                  "cpu": "200m"
                  "memory": "2Gi"
            "write":
              "replicas": 0
      "path": "charts/loki"
      "repoURL": "https://bitbucket.org/paladinanalytics/tdv-helm"
      "targetRevision": "argocd/dev"
    "syncPolicy":
      "automated":
        "allowEmpty": false
        "prune": true
        "selfHeal": true
      "retry":
        "backoff":
          "duration": "5s"
          "factor": 2
          "maxDuration": "5m"
        "limit": 5
      "syncOptions":
      - "Validate=true"
      - "CreateNamespace=false"
      - "PrunePropagationPolicy=foreground"
      - "PruneLast=true"
      - "Replace=false"
      - "RespectIgnoreDifferences=true"
      - "Retry=false"
      - "ServerSideApply=false"

    "additionalAnnotations": {}
    "destination":

    "finalizers":

wordpress-dev
values:
"applications":
  "wordpress-dev":
    "additionalAnnotations":
      "argocd-image-updater.argoproj.io/image-list": "wordpress=me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-app-hub-mec1/dev/wordpress"
      "argocd-image-updater.argoproj.io/wordpress.allow-tags": "regexp:dev\\.snapshot\\..*"
      "argocd-image-updater.argoproj.io/wordpress.helm.image-tag": "wordpress.image.tag"
      "argocd-image-updater.argoproj.io/wordpress.update-strategy": "newest-build"
      "argocd-image-updater.argoproj.io/write-back-method": "git:secret:operator/helm-repository-credentials"
      "notifications.argoproj.io/subscribe.on-deleted.googlechat": "devchat"
      "notifications.argoproj.io/subscribe.on-health-degraded.googlechat": "devchat"
      "notifications.argoproj.io/subscribe.on-sync-failed.googlechat": "devchat"
      "notifications.argoproj.io/subscribe.on-sync-status-unknown.googlechat": "devchat"
    "destination":
      "name": "in-cluster"
      "namespace": "dev"
    "finalizers":
    - "resources-finalizer.argocd.argoproj.io"
    "ignoreDifferences":
    - "group": "external-secrets.io/v1beta1"
      "jqPathExpressions":
      - ".spec.data[].remoteRef.conversionStrategy"
      - ".spec.data[].remoteRef.decodingStrategy"
      - ".spec.data[].remoteRef.metadataPolicy"
      "kind": "ExternalSecret"
    "namespace": "operator"
    "project": "default"
    "source":
      "helm":
        "releaseName": "wordpress-dev"
        "valueFiles":
        - "values-dev.yaml"
        "valuesObject":
          "global":
            "certManager":
              "enabled": false
            "externalSecrets":
              "enabled": true
              "secretStoreRef":
                "kind": "ClusterSecretStore"
                "name": "external-secrets"
            "istio":
              "enabled": true
              "gatewaySelector": "ingressgateway"
              "namespace": "networking"
            "metrics":
              "enabled": true
              "prometheus":
                "namespace": "monitoring"
                "release": "kube-prometheus-stack"
          "phpMyAdmin":
            "image": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1/phpmyadmin:5.2.1-apache"
            "nodeSelector":
              "cloud.google.com/gke-nodepool": "np-tdv-wordpress-dev-mec1"
              "topology.kubernetes.io/region": "me-central1"
          "wordpress":
            "deployment":
              "nodeSelector":
                "cloud.google.com/gke-nodepool": "np-tdv-wordpress-dev-mec1"
                "topology.kubernetes.io/region": "me-central1"
            "image":
              "registry": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-app-hub-mec1/dev"
              "repository": "wordpress"
      "path": "applications/wordpress"
      "repoURL": "https://bitbucket.org/paladinanalytics/tdv-helm"
      "targetRevision": "argocd/dev"
    "syncPolicy":
      "automated":
        "allowEmpty": false
        "prune": true
        "selfHeal": true
      "retry":
        "backoff":
          "duration": "5s"
          "factor": 2
          "maxDuration": "5m"
        "limit": 5
      "syncOptions":
      - "Validate=true"
      - "CreateNamespace=false"
      - "PrunePropagationPolicy=foreground"
      - "PruneLast=true"
      - "Replace=false"
      - "RespectIgnoreDifferences=true"
      - "Retry=false"
      - "ServerSideApply=false"

data.template.app-created:
googlechat:
  cardsV2: |
    - header:
        title: {{ .app.metadata.name }} has been created 🆕
      sections:
        - widgets:
            - decoratedText:
                topLabel: Repository
                text: {{ call .repo.RepoURLToHTTPS .app.spec.source.repoURL }}
            - decoratedText:
                topLabel: Revision
                text: {{ .app.spec.source.targetRevision }}
            - decoratedText:
                topLabel: Author
                text: {{ (call .repo.GetCommitMetadata .app.status.sync.revision).Author }}
            - decoratedText:
                topLabel: Commit
                text: "{{ (call .strings.ReplaceAll (call .repo.GetCommitMetadata .app.status.sync.revision).Message "\n" " | ") }}"
            - buttonList:
                buttons:
                  - text: View in ArgoCD
                    onClick:
                      openLink:
                        url: {{ .context.argocdUrl }}/applications/{{ .app.metadata.name }}

data.trigger.on-created:
- description: Application is created.
  oncePer: app.metadata.name
  send:
  - app-created
  when: "true"
data.trigger.on-deleted:
- description: Application is deleted.
  oncePer: app.metadata.name
  send:
  - app-deleted
  when: app.metadata.deletionTimestamp != nil
data.trigger.on-deployed:
- description: Application is synced and healthy. Triggered once per commit.
  oncePer: app.status.operationState?.syncResult?.revision
  send:
  - app-deployed
  when: app.status.operationState != nil and app.status.operationState.phase in ['Succeeded']
    and app.status.health.status == 'Healthy'
data.trigger.on-health-degraded:
- description: Application has degraded
  send:
  - app-health-degraded
  when: app.status.health.status == 'Degraded'
data.trigger.on-out-of-sync:
- description: Application is out of sync
  send:
  - app-out-of-sync
  when: app.status.sync.status == 'OutOfSync'
data.trigger.on-sync-failed:
- description: Application syncing has failed
  send:
  - app-sync-failed
  when: app.status.operationState != nil and app.status.operationState.phase in ['Error', 'Failed']
data.trigger.on-sync-running:
- description: Application is being synced
  send:
  - app-sync-running
  when: app.status.operationState != nil and app.status.operationState.phase in ['Running']
data.trigger.on-sync-status-unknown:
- description: Application status is 'Unknown'
  send:
  - app-sync-status-unknown
  when: app.status.sync.status == 'Unknown'
data.trigger.on-sync-succeeded:
- description: Application syncing has succeeded
  send:
  - app-sync-succeeded
  when: app.status.operationState != nil and app.status.operationState.phase in ['Succeeded']

data.trigger.on-created:
- description: Application is created.
  oncePer: app.metadata.name
  send:
  - app-created
  when: "true"
data.trigger.on-deleted:
- description: Application is deleted.
  oncePer: app.metadata.name
  send:
  - app-deleted
  when: app.metadata.deletionTimestamp != nil
data.trigger.on-deployed:
- description: Application is synced and healthy. Triggered once per commit.
  oncePer: app.status.operationState?.syncResult?.revision
  send:
  - app-deployed
  when: app.status.operationState != nil and app.status.operationState.phase in ['Succeeded']
    and app.status.health.status == 'Healthy'
data.trigger.on-health-degraded:
- description: Application has degraded
  send:
  - app-health-degraded
  when: app.status.health.status == 'Degraded'
data.trigger.on-out-of-sync:
- description: Application is out of sync
  send:
  - app-out-of-sync
  when: app.status.sync.status == 'OutOfSync'
data.trigger.on-sync-failed:
- description: Application syncing has failed
  send:
  - app-sync-failed
  when: app.status.operationState != nil and app.status.operationState.phase in ['Error', 'Failed']
data.trigger.on-sync-running:
- description: Application is being synced
  send:
  - app-sync-running
  when: app.status.operationState != nil and app.status.operationState.phase in ['Running']
data.trigger.on-sync-status-unknown:
- description: Application status is 'Unknown'
  send:
  - app-sync-status-unknown
  when: app.status.sync.status == 'Unknown'
data.trigger.on-sync-succeeded:
- description: Application syncing has succeeded
  send:
  - app-sync-succeeded
  when: app.status.operationState != nil and app.status.operationState.phase in ['Succeeded']

metadata.name: argocd
metadata.notes:
In order to access the server UI you have the following options:

1. kubectl port-forward service/argocd-server -n operator 8080:443

    and then open the browser on http://localhost:8080 and accept the certificate

2. enable ingress in the values file `server.ingress.enabled` and either
      - Add the annotation for ssl passthrough: https://argo-cd.readthedocs.io/en/stable/operator-manual/ingress/#option-1-ssl-passthrough
      - Set the `configs.params."server.insecure"` in the values file and terminate SSL at your ingress: https://argo-cd.readthedocs.io/en/stable/operator-manual/ingress/#option-2-multiple-ingress-objects-and-hosts


After reaching the UI the first time you can login with username: admin and the random password generated during the installation. You can find the password by running:

kubectl -n operator get secret argocd-initial-admin-secret -o jsonpath="{.data.password}" | base64 -d

(You should delete the initial secret afterwards as suggested by the Getting Started Guide: https://argo-cd.readthedocs.io/en/stable/getting_started/#4-login-using-the-cli)

      "namespace": "monitoring"
"dex":
  "image":
    "repository": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1/dexidp/dex"
    "tag": "v2.42.1"
"exporter":
  "image":
    "repository": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1/oliver006/redis_exporter"
    "tag": "v1.71.0"
"extensions":
  "image":
    "repository": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1/argoprojlabs/argocd-extension-installer"
    "tag": "v0.0.8"
"global":
  "image":
    "repository": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1/argoproj/argocd"
    "tag": "v3.0.0"
  "nodeSelector":
    "cloud.google.com/gke-nodepool": "np-tdv-operator-dev-mec1"
    "topology.kubernetes.io/region": "me-central1"
"redis":
  "image":
    "repository": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1/docker/library/redis"
    "tag": "7.2.8-alpine"
"redis-ha":
  "exporter":
    "image": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1/oliver006/redis_exporter"
    "tag": "v1.71.0"
  "image":
    "repository": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1/docker/library/redis"
    "tag": "7.2.8-alpine"
"redisSecretInit":
  "image":
    "repository": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1/argoproj/argocd"
    "tag": "v3.0.0"
"server":
  "containerPorts":
    "server": 4041
  "metrics":
    "enabled": true
    "serviceMonitor":
      "additionalLabels":
        "release": "kube-prometheus-stack"
      "enabled": true
      "namespace": "monitoring"

before.name: authentication-portal-dev
values:
"applications":
  "authentication-portal-dev":
    "additionalAnnotations":
      "argocd-image-updater.argoproj.io/authentication-portal.allow-tags": "regexp:dev\\.snapshot\\..*"
      "argocd-image-updater.argoproj.io/authentication-portal.helm.image-tag": "authentication-portal.image.tag"
      "argocd-image-updater.argoproj.io/authentication-portal.update-strategy": "newest-build"
      "argocd-image-updater.argoproj.io/image-list": "authentication-portal=me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-app-hub-mec1/dev/authentication-portal"
      "argocd-image-updater.argoproj.io/write-back-method": "git:secret:operator/helm-repository-credentials"
      "notifications.argoproj.io/subscribe.on-deleted.googlechat": "devchat"
      "notifications.argoproj.io/subscribe.on-health-degraded.googlechat": "devchat"
      "notifications.argoproj.io/subscribe.on-sync-failed.googlechat": "devchat"
      "notifications.argoproj.io/subscribe.on-sync-status-unknown.googlechat": "devchat"
    "destination":
      "name": "in-cluster"

before.name: argocd-image-updater
values:
"applications":
  "argocd-image-updater":
    "additionalAnnotations": {}
    "destination":
      "name": "in-cluster"
      "namespace": "operator"
    "finalizers":
    - "resources-finalizer.argocd.argoproj.io"
    "ignoreDifferences": []
    "namespace": "operator"
    "project": "default"
    "source":
      "helm":
        "releaseName": "argocd-image-updater"
        "valueFiles": []
        "valuesObject":
          "argocdimageupdater":
            "authScripts":
              "enabled": true
              "scripts":
                "gke-workload-identity-auth.sh": |
                  #!/bin/sh
                  ACCESS_TOKEN=$(wget --header 'Metadata-Flavor: Google' http://metadata.google.internal/computeMetadata/v1/instance/service-accounts/default/token -q -O - | grep -Eo '"access_token":.*?[^\\]",' | cut -d '"' -f 4)
                  echo "oauth2accesstoken:$ACCESS_TOKEN"
            "config":
              "gitCommitMail": "argo-image-updater@tdv.helm"
              "registries":
              - "api_url": "https://me-central1-docker.pkg.dev"
                "credentials": "ext:/scripts/gke-workload-identity-auth.sh"
                "credsexpire": "30m"
                "name": "GCP Artifact Registry"
                "prefix": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev"
            "image":
              "repository": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1/argoprojlabs/argocd-image-updater"
              "tag": "v0.16.0"
            "metrics":
              "enabled": true
              "serviceMonitor":
                "additionalLabels":
                  "release": "kube-prometheus-stack"
                "enabled": true
                "namespace": "monitoring"
            "nodeSelector":
              "cloud.google.com/gke-nodepool": "np-tdv-operator-dev-mec1"
              "topology.kubernetes.io/region": "me-central1"
            "serviceAccount":
              "annotations":
                "iam.gke.io/gcp-service-account": "tdv-argocdimageupdater-dev@mcit-tdv-dev-spoke.iam.gserviceaccount.com"
              "create": true
              "name": "argocd-image-updater"
      "path": "charts/argocd-image-updater"
      "repoURL": "https://bitbucket.org/paladinanalytics/tdv-helm"
      "targetRevision": "argocd/dev"
    "syncPolicy":
      "automated":
        "allowEmpty": false
        "prune": true
        "selfHeal": true
      "retry":
        "backoff":
          "duration": "5s"
          "factor": 2
          "maxDuration": "5m"
        "limit": 5
      "syncOptions":
      - "Validate=true"
      - "CreateNamespace=false"
      - "PrunePropagationPolicy=foreground"
      - "PruneLast=true"
      - "Replace=false"
      - "RespectIgnoreDifferences=true"
      - "Retry=true"
      - "ServerSideApply=false"

before.name: eck-operator
values:
"applications":
  "eck-operator":
    "additionalAnnotations": {}
    "destination":
      "name": "in-cluster"
      "namespace": "operator"
    "finalizers":
    - "resources-finalizer.argocd.argoproj.io"
    "ignoreDifferences":
    - "jsonPointers":
      - "/metadata/labels"
      "kind": "Secret"
    "namespace": "operator"
    "project": "default"
    "source":
      "helm":
        "releaseName": "eck-operator"
        "valueFiles": []
        "valuesObject":
          "elasticsearch":
            "name": "elasticsearch"
            "namespace": "dev"
            "spec":
              "auth":
                "fileRealm":
                - "secretName": "elasticsearch-credentials"
              "http":
                "tls":
                  "selfSignedCertificate":
                    "disabled": true
              "image": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:8.17.3"
              "nodeSets":
              - "config":
                  "node.roles":
                  - "master"
                "count": 1
                "name": "master"
                "podTemplate":
                  "spec":
                    "automountServiceAccountToken": true
                    "initContainers":
                    - "command":
                      - "sh"
                      - "-c"
                      - "sysctl -w vm.max_map_count=262144"
                      "name": "sysctl"
                      "securityContext":
                        "privileged": true
                        "runAsUser": 0
                    "nodeSelector":
                      "cloud.google.com/gke-nodepool": "np-tdv-application-dev-mec1"
                      "topology.kubernetes.io/region": "me-central1"
                    "serviceAccountName": "elastic"
                "volumeClaimTemplates":
                - "metadata":
                    "name": "elasticsearch-data"
                  "spec":
                    "accessModes":
                    - "ReadWriteOnce"
                    "resources":
                      "requests":
                        "storage": "10Gi"
                    "storageClassName": "standard"
              - "config":
                  "node.roles":
                  - "data"
                  - "ingest"
                  - "transform"
                "count": 2
                "name": "data"
                "podTemplate":
                  "spec":
                    "automountServiceAccountToken": true
                    "initContainers":
                    - "command":
                      - "sh"
                      - "-c"
                      - "sysctl -w vm.max_map_count=262144"
                      "name": "sysctl"
                      "securityContext":
                        "privileged": true
                        "runAsUser": 0
                    "nodeSelector":
                      "cloud.google.com/gke-nodepool": "np-tdv-application-dev-mec1"
                      "topology.kubernetes.io/region": "me-central1"
                    "serviceAccountName": "elastic"
                "volumeClaimTemplates":
                - "metadata":
                    "name": "elasticsearch-data"
                  "spec":
                    "accessModes":
                    - "ReadWriteOnce"
                    "resources":
                      "requests":
                        "storage": "25Gi"
                    "storageClassName": "standard"
              "podDisruptionBudget":
                "spec":
                  "minAvailable": 2
                  "selector":
                    "matchLabels":
                      "elasticsearch.k8s.elastic.co/cluster-name": "elasticsearch"
              "version": "8.17.3"
          "kibana":
            "name": "kibana"
            "namespace": "monitoring"
            "spec":
              "count": 1
              "elasticsearchRef":
                "name": "elasticsearch"
                "namespace": "dev"
              "http":
                "tls":
                  "selfSignedCertificate":
                    "disabled": true
              "image": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1/kibana/kibana:8.17.3"
              "podTemplate":
                "spec":
                  "nodeSelector":
                    "cloud.google.com/gke-nodepool": "np-tdv-monitoring-dev-mec1"
                    "topology.kubernetes.io/region": "me-central1"
              "version": "8.17.3"
          "operator":
            "createClusterScopedResource": true
            "image":
              "repository": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1/eck/eck-operator"
              "tag": "3.0.0"
            "installCRDs": true
            "managedNamespaces": []
            "nodeSelector":
              "cloud.google.com/gke-nodepool": "np-tdv-operator-dev-mec1"
              "topology.kubernetes.io/region": "me-central1"
            "podAnnotations":
              "sidecar.istio.io/inject": "true"
              "traffic.sidecar.istio.io/excludeInboundPorts": "9443"
              "traffic.sidecar.istio.io/includeInboundPorts": "*"
            "podMonitor":
              "enabled": true
              "labels":
                "release": "kube-prometheus-stack"
            "webhook":
              "enabled": true
      "path": "charts/eck-operator"
      "repoURL": "https://bitbucket.org/paladinanalytics/tdv-helm"
      "targetRevision": "argocd/dev"
    "syncPolicy":
      "automated":
        "allowEmpty": false
        "prune": true
        "selfHeal": true
      "retry":
        "backoff":
          "duration": "5s"
          "factor": 2
          "maxDuration": "5m"
        "limit": 5
      "syncOptions":
      - "Validate=true"
      - "CreateNamespace=false"
      - "PrunePropagationPolicy=foreground"
      - "PruneLast=true"
      - "Replace=false"
      - "RespectIgnoreDifferences=true"
      - "Retry=true"
      - "ServerSideApply=false"

before.name: istio
values:
"applications":
  "istio":
    "additionalAnnotations": {}
    "destination":
      "name": "in-cluster"
      "namespace": "networking"
    "finalizers":
    - "resources-finalizer.argocd.argoproj.io"
    "ignoreDifferences":
    - "group": "admissionregistration.k8s.io"
      "jqPathExpressions":
      - ".webhooks[].namespaceSelector.matchExpressions[] | select(.key == \"control-plane\")"
      - ".webhooks[].namespaceSelector.matchExpressions[] | select(.key == \"kubernetes.azure.com/managedby\")"
      "kind": "MutatingWebhookConfiguration"
    - "group": "admissionregistration.k8s.io"
      "jqPathExpressions":
      - ".webhooks[].failurePolicy"
      "kind": "ValidatingWebhookConfiguration"
    - "group": "admissionregistration.k8s.io"
      "jqPathExpressions":
      - ".webhooks[].failurePolicy"
      "kind": "ValidatingWebhookConfiguration"
    - "group": "apps"
      "jqPathExpressions":
      - ".spec.template.spec.containers[].env[].valueFrom.resourceFieldRef.divisor"
      - ".spec.template.spec.initContainers[].env[].valueFrom.resourceFieldRef.divisor"
      "kind": "Deployment"
    "namespace": "operator"
    "project": "default"
    "source":
      "helm":
        "releaseName": "istio"
        "valueFiles": []
        "valuesObject":
          "base":
            "enabled": true
            "global":
              "istioNamespace": "networking"
          "gateway":
            "autoscaling":
              "enabled": true
              "maxReplicas": 20
              "minReplicas": 2
              "targetCPUUtilizationPercentage": 80
            "enabled": true
            "labels":
              "istio": "ingressgateway"
            "nodeSelector":
              "cloud.google.com/gke-nodepool": "np-tdv-networking-dev-mec1"
              "topology.kubernetes.io/region": "me-central1"
            "service":
              "annotations":
                "cloud.google.com/neg": "{\"exposed_ports\":{\"80\":{\"name\":\"tdv-istio-dev\"}}}"
              "loadBalancerIP": ""
              "ports":
              - "name": "status-port"
                "nodePort": null
                "port": 15021
                "protocol": "TCP"
                "targetPort": 15021
              - "name": "http2"
                "nodePort": null
                "port": 80
                "protocol": "TCP"
                "targetPort": 80
              - "name": "https"
                "nodePort": null
                "port": 443
                "protocol": "TCP"
                "targetPort": 443
              "type": "ClusterIP"
            "topologySpreadConstraints": []
          "istiod":
            "autoscaleEnabled": true
            "autoscaleMin": 2
            "enabled": true
            "global":
              "defaultNodeSelector":
                "cloud.google.com/gke-nodepool": "np-tdv-networking-dev-mec1"
                "topology.kubernetes.io/region": "me-central1"
              "hub": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1/istio/pilot"
              "istioNamespace": "networking"
              "proxy":
                "image": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1/istio/proxyv2:1.26.0"
                "tracer": "zipkin"
              "proxy_init":
                "image": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1/istio/proxyv2:1.26.0"
              "tag": "1.26.0"
            "image": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1/istio/pilot:1.26.0"
            "meshConfig":
              "defaultConfig":
                "holdApplicationUntilProxyStarts": true
                "tracing":
                  "zipkin":
                    "address": "tempo.monitoring.svc.cluster.local:9411"
              "defaultProviders":
                "metrics":
                - "prometheus"
                "tracing":
                - "zipkin"
              "enablePrometheusMerge": true
              "enableTracing": true
              "extensionProviders":
              - "name": "zipkin"
                "zipkin":
                  "port": 9411
                  "service": "tempo.monitoring.svc.cluster.local"
            "nodeSelector":
              "cloud.google.com/gke-nodepool": "np-tdv-networking-dev-mec1"
              "topology.kubernetes.io/region": "me-central1"
            "proxy":
              "enableTracing": true
            "replicaCount": 2
            "traceSampling": 100
          "metrics":
            "enabled": true
            "prometheus":
              "namespace": "monitoring"
              "release": "kube-prometheus-stack"
          "mtls":
            "enabled": true
            "namespace":
            - "networking"
      "path": "charts/istio"
      "repoURL": "https://bitbucket.org/paladinanalytics/tdv-helm"
      "targetRevision": "argocd/dev"
    "syncPolicy":
      "automated":
        "allowEmpty": false
        "prune": true
        "selfHeal": true
      "retry":
        "backoff":
          "duration": "5s"
          "factor": 2
          "maxDuration": "5m"
        "limit": 5
      "syncOptions":
      - "Validate=true"
      - "CreateNamespace=false"
      - "PrunePropagationPolicy=foreground"
      - "PruneLast=true"
      - "Replace=false"
      - "RespectIgnoreDifferences=true"
      - "Retry=true"
      - "ServerSideApply=false"

before.name: kube-prometheus-stack
values:
"applications":
  "kube-prometheus-stack":
    "additionalAnnotations": {}
    "destination":
      "name": "in-cluster"
      "namespace": "monitoring"
    "finalizers":
    - "resources-finalizer.argocd.argoproj.io"
    "ignoreDifferences":
    - "jsonPointers":
      - "/metadata/annotations"
      "kind": "Service"
      "name": "kube-prometheus-stack-kube-state-metrics"
      "namespace": "monitoring"
    - "jsonPointers":
      - "/metadata/annotations"
      "kind": "Service"
      "name": "kube-prometheus-stack-prometheus-node-exporter"
      "namespace": "monitoring"
    "namespace": "operator"
    "project": "default"
    "source":
      "helm":
        "releaseName": "kube-prometheus-stack"
        "valueFiles": []
        "valuesObject":
          "kubePrometheusStack":
            "alertmanager":
              "alertmanagerSpec":
                "image":
                  "registry": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1"
                  "repository": "prometheus/alertmanager"
                  "tag": "v0.28.1"
                "nodeSelector":
                  "cloud.google.com/gke-nodepool": "np-tdv-monitoring-dev-mec1"
                  "topology.kubernetes.io/region": "me-central1"
            "crds":
              "upgradeJob":
                "image":
                  "busybox":
                    "registry": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1"
                    "repository": "busybox"
                    "tag": "1.37.0"
                  "kubectl":
                    "registry": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1"
                    "repository": "kubectl"
                    "tag": "v1.31.5"
                "nodeSelector":
                  "cloud.google.com/gke-nodepool": "np-tdv-monitoring-dev-mec1"
                  "topology.kubernetes.io/region": "me-central1"
            "fullnameOverride": "kube-prometheus-stack"
            "global":
              "imageRegistry": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1"
            "grafana":
              "dashboardProviders":
                "dashboardproviders.yaml":
                  "apiVersion": 1
                  "providers":
                  - "disableDeletion": false
                    "editable": true
                    "folder": "default"
                    "name": "default"
                    "options":
                      "path": "/var/lib/grafana/dashboards/default"
                    "orgId": 1
                    "type": "file"
                  - "disableDeletion": false
                    "editable": true
                    "folder": "istio"
                    "name": "istio"
                    "options":

before.name: pgbouncer
values:
"applications":
  "pgbouncer":
    "additionalAnnotations": {}
    "destination":
      "name": "in-cluster"
      "namespace": "dev"
    "finalizers":
    - "resources-finalizer.argocd.argoproj.io"
    "ignoreDifferences":
    - "group": "external-secrets.io/v1beta1"
      "jqPathExpressions":
      - ".spec.data[].remoteRef.conversionStrategy"
      - ".spec.data[].remoteRef.decodingStrategy"
      - ".spec.data[].remoteRef.metadataPolicy"
      "kind": "ExternalSecret"
    "namespace": "operator"
    "project": "default"
    "source":
      "helm":
        "releaseName": "pgbouncer"
        "valueFiles": []
        "valuesObject":
          "pgbouncer":
            "deployment":
              "nodeSelector":
                "cloud.google.com/gke-nodepool": "np-tdv-application-dev-mec1"
                "topology.kubernetes.io/region": "me-central1"
              "pod":
                "initContainers":
                - "args":
                  - "--private-ip"
                  - "--auto-iam-authn"
                  - "--structured-logs"
                  - "--port=5432"
                  - "mcit-tdv-dev-spoke:me-central1:psql-tdv-intl-dev-mec1"
                  "image":
                    "registry": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1"
                    "repository": "cloud-sql-connectors/cloud-sql-proxy"
                    "tag": "2.17.0"
                  "name": "cloud-sql-proxy"
                  "resources":
                    "limits":
                      "cpu": "2000m"
                      "memory": "200Mi"
                    "requests":
                      "cpu": "1000m"
                      "memory": "100Mi"
                  "securityContext":
                    "allowPrivilegeEscalation": false
                    "capabilities":
                      "drop":
                      - "ALL"
                    "privileged": false
                    "runAsGroup": 1001
                    "runAsNonRoot": true
                    "runAsUser": 1001
                    "seccompProfile":
                      "type": "RuntimeDefault"
            "enabled": true
            "externalSecretStore":
              "kind": "ClusterSecretStore"
              "name": "external-secrets"
            "image":
              "registry": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1"
              "repository": "bitnami/pgbouncer"
              "tag": "1.24.1"
            "serviceAccount":
              "annotations":
                "iam.gke.io/gcp-service-account": "tdv-pgbouncer-dev@mcit-tdv-dev-spoke.iam.gserviceaccount.com"
              "labels": null
              "name": "pgbouncer"
      "path": "applications/pgbouncer"
      "repoURL": "https://bitbucket.org/paladinanalytics/tdv-helm"
      "targetRevision": "argocd/dev"
    "syncPolicy":
      "automated":
        "allowEmpty": false
        "prune": true
        "selfHeal": true
      "retry":
        "backoff":
          "duration": "5s"
          "factor": 2
          "maxDuration": "5m"
        "limit": 5
      "syncOptions":
      - "Validate=true"
      - "CreateNamespace=false"
      - "PrunePropagationPolicy=foreground"
      - "PruneLast=true"
      - "Replace=false"
      - "RespectIgnoreDifferences=true"
      - "Retry=true"
      - "ServerSideApply=false"

before.name: velero
values:
"applications":
  "velero":
    "additionalAnnotations": {}
    "destination":
      "name": "in-cluster"
      "namespace": "operator"
    "finalizers":
    - "resources-finalizer.argocd.argoproj.io"
    "ignoreDifferences": []
    "namespace": "operator"
    "project": "default"
    "source":
      "helm":
        "releaseName": "velero"
        "valueFiles": []
        "valuesObject":
          "velero":
            "backupsEnabled": true
            "configuration":
              "backupStorageLocation":
              - "bucket": "sb-tdv-velero-dev-mec1"
                "config":
                  "serviceAccount":
                    "annotations":
                      "iam.gke.io/gcp-service-account": "tdv-velero-dev@mcit-tdv-dev-spoke.iam.gserviceaccount.com"
                    "name": "velero"
                "name": "default"
                "provider": "velero.io/gcp"
              "features": "EnableCSI"
              "volumeSnapshotLocation":
              - "name": "default"
                "provider": "velero.io/gcp"
            "credentials":
              "useSecret": false
            "image":
              "registry": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1"
              "repository": "velero/velero"
              "tag": "v1.16.1"
            "initContainers":
            - "image": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1/velero/velero-plugin-for-gcp:v1.12.1"
              "name": "velero-plugin-for-gcp"
              "volumeMounts":
              - "mountPath": "/target"
                "name": "plugins"
            "kubectl":
              "image":
                "repository": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1/bitnamilegacy/kubectl"
                "tag": "1.16.15"
            "nodeSelector":
              "cloud.google.com/gke-nodepool": "np-tdv-operator-dev-mec1"
              "topology.kubernetes.io/region": "me-central1"
            "schedules":
              "daily":
                "annotations": null
                "disabled": false
                "labels": null
                "name": "daily"
                "schedule": "0 1 * * *"
                "template":
                  "includeClusterResources": false
                  "includedNamespaces":
                  - "dev"
                  - "monitoring"
                  "snapshotVolumes": true
                  "storageLocation": "default"
                  "ttl": "168h"
                  "volumeSnapshotLocations":
                  - "default"
                "useOwnerReferencesInBackup": true
            "serviceAccount":
              "server":
                "annotations":
                  "iam.gke.io/gcp-service-account": "tdv-velero-dev@mcit-tdv-dev-spoke.iam.gserviceaccount.com"
                "create": true
                "name": "velero"
            "snapshotsEnabled": true
      "path": "charts/velero"
      "repoURL": "https://bitbucket.org/paladinanalytics/tdv-helm"
      "targetRevision": "argocd/dev"
    "syncPolicy":
      "automated":
        "allowEmpty": false
        "prune": true
        "selfHeal": true
      "retry":
        "backoff":
          "duration": "5s"
          "factor": 2
          "maxDuration": "5m"
        "limit": 5
      "syncOptions":
      - "Validate=true"
      - "CreateNamespace=false"
      - "PrunePropagationPolicy=foreground"
      - "PruneLast=true"
      - "Replace=false"
      - "RespectIgnoreDifferences=true"
      - "Retry=true"
      - "ServerSideApply=false"

data.template.app-created:
googlechat:
  cardsV2: |
    - header:
        title: {{ .app.metadata.name }} has been created 🆕
      sections:
        - widgets:
            - decoratedText:
                topLabel: Repository
                text: {{ call .repo.RepoURLToHTTPS .app.spec.source.repoURL }}
            - decoratedText:
                topLabel: Revision
                text: {{ .app.spec.source.targetRevision }}
            - decoratedText:
                topLabel: Author
                text: {{ (call .repo.GetCommitMetadata .app.status.sync.revision).Author }}
            - decoratedText:
                topLabel: Commit
                text: "{{ (call .strings.ReplaceAll (call .repo.GetCommitMetadata .app.status.sync.revision).Message "\n" " | ") }}"
            - buttonList:
                buttons:
                  - text: View in ArgoCD
                    onClick:
                      openLink:
                        url: {{ .context.argocdUrl }}/applications/{{ .app.metadata.name }}

data.trigger.on-created:
- description: Application is created.
  oncePer: app.metadata.name
  send:
  - app-created
  when: "true"
data.trigger.on-deleted:
- description: Application is deleted.
  oncePer: app.metadata.name
  send:
  - app-deleted
  when: app.metadata.deletionTimestamp != nil
data.trigger.on-deployed:
- description: Application is synced and healthy. Triggered once per commit.
  oncePer: app.status.operationState?.syncResult?.revision
  send:
  - app-deployed
  when: app.status.operationState != nil and app.status.operationState.phase in ['Succeeded']
    and app.status.health.status == 'Healthy'
data.trigger.on-health-degraded:
- description: Application has degraded
  send:
  - app-health-degraded
  when: app.status.health.status == 'Degraded'
data.trigger.on-out-of-sync:
- description: Application is out of sync
  send:
  - app-out-of-sync
  when: app.status.sync.status == 'OutOfSync'
data.trigger.on-sync-failed:
- description: Application syncing has failed
  send:
  - app-sync-failed
  when: app.status.operationState != nil and app.status.operationState.phase in ['Error', 'Failed']
data.trigger.on-sync-running:
- description: Application is being synced
  send:
  - app-sync-running
  when: app.status.operationState != nil and app.status.operationState.phase in ['Running']
data.trigger.on-sync-status-unknown:
- description: Application status is 'Unknown'
  send:
  - app-sync-status-unknown
  when: app.status.sync.status == 'Unknown'
data.trigger.on-sync-succeeded:
- description: Application syncing has succeeded
  send:
  - app-sync-succeeded
  when: app.status.operationState != nil and app.status.operationState.phase in ['Succeeded']

data.policy.csv:
g, ArgoCDAdmins, role:admin
g, ArgoCDReadOnly, role:readonly

metadata.name: argocd
metadata.notes:
In order to access the server UI you have the following options:

1. kubectl port-forward service/argocd-server -n operator 8080:443

    and then open the browser on http://localhost:8080 and accept the certificate

2. enable ingress in the values file `server.ingress.enabled` and either
      - Add the annotation for ssl passthrough: https://argo-cd.readthedocs.io/en/stable/operator-manual/ingress/#option-1-ssl-passthrough
      - Set the `configs.params."server.insecure"` in the values file and terminate SSL at your ingress: https://argo-cd.readthedocs.io/en/stable/operator-manual/ingress/#option-2-multiple-ingress-objects-and-hosts


After reaching the UI the first time you can login with username: admin and the random password generated during the installation. You can find the password by running:

kubectl -n operator get secret argocd-initial-admin-secret -o jsonpath="{.data.password}" | base64 -d

(You should delete the initial secret afterwards as suggested by the Getting Started Guide: https://argo-cd.readthedocs.io/en/stable/getting_started/#4-login-using-the-cli)

values.name: argocd-image-updater
values:
"applications":
  "argocd-image-updater":
    "additionalAnnotations": {}
    "destination":
      "name": "in-cluster"
      "namespace": "operator"
    "finalizers":
    - "resources-finalizer.argocd.argoproj.io"
    "ignoreDifferences": []
    "namespace": "operator"
    "project": "default"
    "source":
      "helm":
        "releaseName": "argocd-image-updater"
        "valueFiles": []
        "valuesObject":
          "argocdimageupdater":
            "authScripts":
              "enabled": true
              "scripts":
                "gke-workload-identity-auth.sh": |
                  #!/bin/sh
                  ACCESS_TOKEN=$(wget --header 'Metadata-Flavor: Google' http://metadata.google.internal/computeMetadata/v1/instance/service-accounts/default/token -q -O - | grep -Eo '"access_token":.*?[^\\]",' | cut -d '"' -f 4)
                  echo "oauth2accesstoken:$ACCESS_TOKEN"
            "config":
              "gitCommitMail": "argo-image-updater@tdv.helm"
              "registries":
              - "api_url": "https://me-central1-docker.pkg.dev"
                "credentials": "ext:/scripts/gke-workload-identity-auth.sh"
                "credsexpire": "30m"
                "name": "GCP Artifact Registry"
                "prefix": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev"
            "image":
              "repository": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1/argoprojlabs/argocd-image-updater"
              "tag": "v0.16.0"
            "metrics":
              "enabled": true
              "serviceMonitor":
                "additionalLabels":
                  "release": "kube-prometheus-stack"
                "enabled": true
                "namespace": "monitoring"
            "nodeSelector":
              "cloud.google.com/gke-nodepool": "np-tdv-operator-dev-mec1"
              "topology.kubernetes.io/region": "me-central1"
            "serviceAccount":
              "annotations":
                "iam.gke.io/gcp-service-account": "tdv-argocdimageupdater-dev@mcit-tdv-dev-spoke.iam.gserviceaccount.com"
              "create": true
              "name": "argocd-image-updater"
      "path": "charts/argocd-image-updater"
      "repoURL": "https://bitbucket.org/paladinanalytics/tdv-helm"
      "targetRevision": "argocd/dev"
    "syncPolicy":
      "automated":
        "allowEmpty": false
        "prune": true
        "selfHeal": true
      "retry":
        "backoff":
          "duration": "5s"
          "factor": 2
          "maxDuration": "5m"
        "limit": 5
      "syncOptions":
      - "Validate=true"
      - "CreateNamespace=false"
      - "PrunePropagationPolicy=foreground"
      - "PruneLast=true"
      - "Replace=false"
      - "RespectIgnoreDifferences=true"
      - "Retry=true"
      - "ServerSideApply=false"

values:
"applications":
  "eck-operator":
    "additionalAnnotations": {}
    "destination":
      "name": "in-cluster"
      "namespace": "operator"
    "finalizers":
    - "resources-finalizer.argocd.argoproj.io"
    "ignoreDifferences":
    - "jsonPointers":
      - "/metadata/labels"
      "kind": "Secret"
    "namespace": "operator"
    "project": "default"
    "source":
      "helm":
        "releaseName": "eck-operator"
        "valueFiles": []
        "valuesObject":
          "elasticsearch":
            "name": "elasticsearch"
            "namespace": "dev"
            "spec":
              "auth":
                "fileRealm":
                - "secretName": "elasticsearch-credentials"
              "http":
                "tls":
                  "selfSignedCertificate":
                    "disabled": true
              "image": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:8.17.3"
              "nodeSets":
              - "config":
                  "node.roles":
                  - "master"
                "count": 1
                "name": "master"
                "podTemplate":
                  "spec":
                    "automountServiceAccountToken": true
                    "initContainers":
                    - "command":
                      - "sh"
                      - "-c"
                      - "sysctl -w vm.max_map_count=262144"
                      "name": "sysctl"
                      "securityContext":
                        "privileged": true
                        "runAsUser": 0
                    "nodeSelector":
                      "cloud.google.com/gke-nodepool": "np-tdv-application-dev-mec1"
                      "topology.kubernetes.io/region": "me-central1"
                    "serviceAccountName": "elastic"
                "volumeClaimTemplates":
                - "metadata":
                    "name": "elasticsearch-data"
                  "spec":
                    "accessModes":
                    - "ReadWriteOnce"
                    "resources":
                      "requests":
                        "storage": "10Gi"
                    "storageClassName": "standard"
              - "config":
                  "node.roles":
                  - "data"
                  - "ingest"
                  - "transform"
                "count": 2
                "name": "data"
                "podTemplate":
                  "spec":
                    "automountServiceAccountToken": true
                    "initContainers":
                    - "command":
                      - "sh"
                      - "-c"
                      - "sysctl -w vm.max_map_count=262144"
                      "name": "sysctl"
                      "securityContext":
                        "privileged": true
                        "runAsUser": 0
                    "nodeSelector":
                      "cloud.google.com/gke-nodepool": "np-tdv-application-dev-mec1"
                      "topology.kubernetes.io/region": "me-central1"
                    "serviceAccountName": "elastic"
                "volumeClaimTemplates":
                - "metadata":
                    "name": "elasticsearch-data"
                  "spec":
                    "accessModes":

          "kibana":

                    "disabled": true
              "image": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1/kibana/kibana:8.17.3"
              "podTemplate":
                "spec":
                  "nodeSelector":
                    "cloud.google.com/gke-nodepool": "np-tdv-monitoring-dev-mec1"
                    "topology.kubernetes.io/region": "me-central1"
              "version": "8.17.3"
          "operator":
            "createClusterScopedResource": true
            "image":
              "repository": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1/eck/eck-operator"
              "tag": "3.0.0"
            "installCRDs": true
            "managedNamespaces": []
            "nodeSelector":
              "cloud.google.com/gke-nodepool": "np-tdv-operator-dev-mec1"
              "topology.kubernetes.io/region": "me-central1"
            "podAnnotations":
              "sidecar.istio.io/inject": "true"
              "traffic.sidecar.istio.io/excludeInboundPorts": "9443"
              "traffic.sidecar.istio.io/includeInboundPorts": "*"
            "podMonitor":
              "enabled": true
              "labels":
                "release": "kube-prometheus-stack"
            "webhook":
              "enabled": true
      "path": "charts/eck-operator"
