istio
values:
"applications":
  "istio":
    "additionalAnnotations": {}
    "destination":
      "name": "in-cluster"
      "namespace": "networking"
    "finalizers":
    - "resources-finalizer.argocd.argoproj.io"
    "ignoreDifferences":
    - "group": "admissionregistration.k8s.io"
      "jqPathExpressions":
      - ".webhooks[].namespaceSelector.matchExpressions[] | select(.key == \"control-plane\")"
      - ".webhooks[].namespaceSelector.matchExpressions[] | select(.key == \"kubernetes.azure.com/managedby\")"
      "kind": "MutatingWebhookConfiguration"
    - "group": "admissionregistration.k8s.io"
      "jqPathExpressions":
      - ".webhooks[].failurePolicy"
      "kind": "ValidatingWebhookConfiguration"
    - "group": "admissionregistration.k8s.io"
      "jqPathExpressions":
      - ".webhooks[].failurePolicy"
      "kind": "ValidatingWebhookConfiguration"
    - "group": "apps"
      "jqPathExpressions":
      - ".spec.template.spec.containers[].env[].valueFrom.resourceFieldRef.divisor"
      - ".spec.template.spec.initContainers[].env[].valueFrom.resourceFieldRef.divisor"
      "kind": "Deployment"
    "namespace": "operator"
    "project": "default"
    "source":
      "helm":
        "releaseName": "istio"
        "valueFiles": []
        "valuesObject":
          "base":
            "enabled": true
            "global":
              "istioNamespace": "networking"
          "gateway":
            "autoscaling":
              "enabled": true
              "maxReplicas": 20
              "minReplicas": 2
              "targetCPUUtilizationPercentage": 80
            "enabled": true
            "labels":
              "istio": "ingressgateway"
            "nodeSelector":
              "cloud.google.com/gke-nodepool": "np-tdv-networking-dev-mec1"
              "topology.kubernetes.io/region": "me-central1"
            "service":
              "annotations":
                "cloud.google.com/neg": "{\"exposed_ports\":{\"80\":{\"name\":\"tdv-istio-dev\"}}}"
              "loadBalancerIP": ""
              "ports":
              - "name": "status-port"
                "nodePort": null
                "port": 15021
                "protocol": "TCP"
                "targetPort": 15021
              - "name": "http2"
                "nodePort": null
                "port": 80
                "protocol": "TCP"
                "targetPort": 80
              - "name": "https"
                "nodePort": null
                "port": 443
                "protocol": "TCP"
                "targetPort": 443
              "type": "ClusterIP"
            "topologySpreadConstraints": []
          "istiod":
            "autoscaleEnabled": true
            "autoscaleMin": 2
            "enabled": true
            "global":
              "defaultNodeSelector":
                "cloud.google.com/gke-nodepool": "np-tdv-networking-dev-mec1"
                "topology.kubernetes.io/region": "me-central1"
              "hub": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1/istio/pilot"
              "istioNamespace": "networking"
              "proxy":
                "image": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1/istio/proxyv2:1.26.0"
                "tracer": "zipkin"
              "proxy_init":
                "image": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1/istio/proxyv2:1.26.0"
              "tag": "1.26.0"
            "image": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1/istio/pilot:1.26.0"
            "meshConfig":
              "defaultConfig":
                "holdApplicationUntilProxyStarts": true
                "tracing":
                  "zipkin":
                    "address": "tempo.monitoring.svc.cluster.local:9411"
              "defaultProviders":
                "metrics":
                - "prometheus"
                "tracing":
                - "zipkin"
              "enablePrometheusMerge": true
              "enableTracing": true
              "extensionProviders":
              - "name": "zipkin"
                "zipkin":
                  "port": 9411
                  "service": "tempo.monitoring.svc.cluster.local"
            "nodeSelector":
              "cloud.google.com/gke-nodepool": "np-tdv-networking-dev-mec1"
              "topology.kubernetes.io/region": "me-central1"
            "proxy":
              "enableTracing": true
            "replicaCount": 2
            "traceSampling": 100
          "metrics":
            "enabled": true
            "prometheus":
              "namespace": "monitoring"
              "release": "kube-prometheus-stack"
          "mtls":
            "enabled": true
            "namespace":
            - "networking"
      "path": "charts/istio"
      "repoURL": "https://bitbucket.org/paladinanalytics/tdv-helm"
      "targetRevision": "argocd/dev"
    "syncPolicy":
      "automated":
        "allowEmpty": false
        "prune": true
        "selfHeal": true
      "retry":
        "backoff":
          "duration": "5s"
          "factor": 2
          "maxDuration": "5m"
        "limit": 5
      "syncOptions":
      - "Validate=true"
      - "CreateNamespace=false"
      - "PrunePropagationPolicy=foreground"
      - "PruneLast=true"
      - "Replace=false"
      - "RespectIgnoreDifferences=true"
      - "Retry=true"
      - "ServerSideApply=false"

values.name: kube-prometheus-stack
values:
"applications":
  "kube-prometheus-stack":
    "additionalAnnotations": {}
    "destination":
      "name": "in-cluster"
      "namespace": "monitoring"
    "finalizers":
    - "resources-finalizer.argocd.argoproj.io"
    "ignoreDifferences":
    - "jsonPointers":
      - "/metadata/annotations"
      "kind": "Service"
      "name": "kube-prometheus-stack-kube-state-metrics"
      "namespace": "monitoring"
    - "jsonPointers":
      - "/metadata/annotations"
      "kind": "Service"
      "name": "kube-prometheus-stack-prometheus-node-exporter"
      "namespace": "monitoring"
    "namespace": "operator"
    "project": "default"
    "source":
      "helm":
        "releaseName": "kube-prometheus-stack"
        "valueFiles": []
        "valuesObject":
          "kubePrometheusStack":
            "alertmanager":
              "alertmanagerSpec":
                "image":
                  "registry": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1"
                  "repository": "prometheus/alertmanager"
                  "tag": "v0.28.1"
                "nodeSelector":
                  "cloud.google.com/gke-nodepool": "np-tdv-monitoring-dev-mec1"
                  "topology.kubernetes.io/region": "me-central1"
            "crds":
              "upgradeJob":
                "image":
                  "busybox":
                    "registry": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1"
                    "repository": "busybox"
                    "tag": "1.37.0"
                  "kubectl":
                    "registry": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1"
                    "repository": "kubectl"
                    "tag": "v1.31.5"
                "nodeSelector":
                  "cloud.google.com/gke-nodepool": "np-tdv-monitoring-dev-mec1"
                  "topology.kubernetes.io/region": "me-central1"
            "fullnameOverride": "kube-prometheus-stack"
            "global":
              "imageRegistry": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1"
            "grafana":
              "dashboardProviders":
                "dashboardproviders.yaml":
                  "apiVersion": 1
                  "providers":
                  - "disableDeletion": false
                    "editable": true
                    "folder": "default"
                    "name": "default"
                    "options":
                      "path": "/var/lib/grafana/dashboards/default"
                    "orgId": 1
                    "type": "file"
                  - "disableDeletion": false
                    "editable": true
                    "folder": "istio"
                    "name": "istio"
                    "options":
                      "path": "/var/lib/grafana/dashboards/istio"
                    "orgId": 1
                    "type": "file"
              "dashboardsConfigMaps":
                "default": "grafana-dashboards-default"
                "istio": "grafana-dashboards-istio"
              "datasources":
                "datasources.yaml":
                  "apiVersion": 1
                  "datasources":
                  - "access": "proxy"
                    "isDefault": false
                    "jsonData":
                      "derivedFields":
                      - "datasourceName": "Tempo"
                        "datasourceUid": "tempo"
                        "matcherRegex": "traceId[=:]\\\"?([a-f0-9]+)"
                        "name": "TraceID"
                        "url": "$${__value.raw}"
                        "urlDisplayLabel": "View Trace"
                      "httpHeaderName1": "X-Scope-OrgID"
                    "name": "Loki"
                    "secureJsonData":
                      "httpHeaderValue1": "tdv-dev"
                    "type": "loki"
                    "uid": "loki"
                    "url": "http://loki-gateway.monitoring.svc.cluster.local:80"
                  - "access": "proxy"
                    "isDefault": false
                    "jsonData":
                      "nodeGraph":
                        "enabled": true
                      "search":
                        "hide": false
                      "serviceMap":
                        "datasourceUid": "prometheus"
                      "traceQuery":
                        "spanEndTimeShift": "1h"
                        "spanStartTimeShift": "-1h"
                        "timeShiftEnabled": true
                      "tracesToLogsV2":
                        "datasourceUid": "loki"
                        "filterBySpanID": true
                        "filterByTraceID": true
                        "spanEndTimeShift": "1h"
                        "spanStartTimeShift": "-1h"
                      "tracesToMetrics":
                        "datasourceUid": "prometheus"
                        "spanEndTimeShift": "1h"
                        "spanStartTimeShift": "-1h"
                    "name": "Tempo"
                    "type": "tempo"
                    "uid": "tempo"
                    "url": "http://tempo.monitoring.svc.cluster.local:3100"
              "extraSecretMounts":
              - "defaultMode": "0440"
                "mountPath": "/etc/secrets/auth_generic_oauth"
                "name": "grafana-keycloak-client-secret"
                "readOnly": true
                "secretName": "grafana-keycloak-client-secret"
              "grafana.ini":
                "analytics":
                  "check_for_updates": false
                "auth.generic_oauth":
                  "allow_assign_grafana_admin": "true"
                  "allow_sign_up": "true"
                  "api_url": "http://authentication-portal.dev.svc.cluster.local/realms/infrastructure/protocol/openid-connect/userinfo"
                  "auth_url": "https://auth-tdv-dev.surge.tools/realms/infrastructure/protocol/openid-connect/auth"
                  "auto_login": "false"
                  "client_id": "$__file{/etc/secrets/auth_generic_oauth/client_id}"
                  "client_secret": "$__file{/etc/secrets/auth_generic_oauth/client_secret}"
                  "email_attribute_name": "email"
                  "email_attribute_path": "email"
                  "enabled": "true"
                  "login_attribute_path": "preferred_username"
                  "name": "Keycloak"
                  "name_attribute_path": "name"
                  "role_attribute_path": "(contains(resource_access.grafana.roles[],
                    'grafanaAdmin') && 'GrafanaAdmin') || (contains(resource_access.grafana.roles[],
                    'admin') && 'Admin') || (contains(resource_access.grafana.roles[],
                    'editor') && 'Editor') || 'Viewer'"
                  "role_attribute_strict": "true"
                  "scopes": "openid email profile offline_access roles"
                  "token_url": "http://authentication-portal.dev.svc.cluster.local/realms/infrastructure/protocol/openid-connect/token"
                  "use_refresh_token": "false"
                "security":
                  "disable_initial_admin_creation": true
                "server":
                  "http_port": 4042
                  "root_url": "https://grafana-tdv-dev.surge.tools"
              "image":
                "registry": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1"
                "repository": "grafana/grafana"
                "tag": "12.2.1"
              "livenessProbe":
                "failureThreshold": 10
                "httpGet":
                  "path": "/api/health"
                  "port": 4042
                "initialDelaySeconds": 60
                "timeoutSeconds": 30
              "nodeSelector":
                "cloud.google.com/gke-nodepool": "np-tdv-monitoring-dev-mec1"
                "topology.kubernetes.io/region": "me-central1"
              "readinessProbe":
                "httpGet":
                  "path": "/api/health"
                  "port": 4042
              "service":
                "targetPort": 4042
              "sidecar":
                "alerts":
                  "reloadURL": "http://localhost:4042/api/admin/provisioning/alerting/reload"
                "dashboards":
                  "reloadURL": "http://localhost:4042/api/admin/provisioning/dashboards/reload"
                "datasources":
                  "reloadURL": "http://localhost:4042/api/admin/provisioning/datasources/reload"
                "image":
                  "registry": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1"
                  "repository": "kiwigrid/k8s-sidecar"
                  "tag": "1.30.10"
                "notifiers":
                  "reloadURL": "http://localhost:4042/api/admin/provisioning/notifications/reload"
                "plugins":
                  "reloadURL": "http://localhost:4042/api/admin/provisioning/plugins/reload"
            "kube-state-metrics":
              "image":
                "registry": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1"
                "repository": "kube-state-metrics/kube-state-metrics"
                "tag": "v2.17.0"
              "nodeSelector":
                "cloud.google.com/gke-nodepool": "np-tdv-monitoring-dev-mec1"
                "topology.kubernetes.io/region": "me-central1"
            "nameOverride": "kube-prometheus-stack"
            "prometheus":
              "prometheusSpec":
                "image":
                  "registry": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1"
                  "repository": "prometheus/prometheus"
                  "tag": "v3.7.3"
                "nodeSelector":
                  "cloud.google.com/gke-nodepool": "np-tdv-monitoring-dev-mec1"
                  "topology.kubernetes.io/region": "me-central1"
                "retention": "14d"
                "retentionSize": "50GiB"
                "storageSpec":
                  "volumeClaimTemplate":
                    "spec":
                      "accessModes":
                      - "ReadWriteOnce"
                      "resources":
                        "requests":
                          "storage": "50Gi"
                      "storageClassName": "standard-rwo-retain"
                "walCompression": true
            "prometheus-node-exporter":
              "image":
                "registry": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1"
                "repository": "prometheus/node-exporter"
                "tag": "v1.10.2"
            "prometheusOperator":
              "admissionWebhooks":
                "deployment":
                  "image":
                    "registry": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1"
                    "repository": "prometheus-operator/admission-webhook"
                    "tag": "v0.82.0"
                  "nodeSelector":
                    "cloud.google.com/gke-nodepool": "np-tdv-monitoring-dev-mec1"
                    "topology.kubernetes.io/region": "me-central1"
                "patch":
                  "image":
                    "registry": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1"
                    "repository": "ingress-nginx/kube-webhook-certgen"
                    "tag": "v1.6.4"
                  "nodeSelector":
                    "cloud.google.com/gke-nodepool": "np-tdv-monitoring-dev-mec1"
                    "topology.kubernetes.io/region": "me-central1"
              "image":
                "registry": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1"
                "repository": "prometheus-operator/prometheus-operator"

"applications":
  "loki":
    "additionalAnnotations": {}

      "name": "loki-canary"
      "namespace": "monitoring"
    - "jsonPointers":
      - "/metadata/annotations"
      "kind": "Service"
      "name": "loki-headless"
      "namespace": "monitoring"
    - "jsonPointers":
      - "/metadata/annotations"
      "kind": "Service"
      "name": "loki-memberlist"
      "namespace": "monitoring"
    - "jsonPointers":

      "kind": "Service"
      "name": "loki-results-cache"
      "namespace": "monitoring"
    - "jsonPointers":
      - "/metadata/annotations"
      "kind": "Service"
      "name": "loki-gateway"
      "namespace": "monitoring"
    "namespace": "operator"
    "project": "default"
    "source":
      "helm":
        "releaseName": "loki"
        "valueFiles": []
        "valuesObject":
          "loki":
            "backend":
              "replicas": 0
            "bloomCompactor":
              "replicas": 0
            "bloomGateway":
              "replicas": 0
            "chunksCache":
              "allocatedMemory": 1024
              "enabled": false
              "nodeSelector":
                "cloud.google.com/gke-nodepool": "np-tdv-monitoring-dev-mec1"
                "topology.kubernetes.io/region": "me-central1"
              "writebackSizeLimit": "500MB"
            "deploymentMode": "SingleBinary"
            "distributor":
              "replicas": 0
            "gateway":
              "image":
                "registry": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1"
                "repository": "nginxinc/nginx-unprivileged"
                "tag": "1.27-alpine"
              "nodeSelector":
                "cloud.google.com/gke-nodepool": "np-tdv-monitoring-dev-mec1"
                "topology.kubernetes.io/region": "me-central1"
            "indexGateway":
              "replicas": 0
            "ingester":
              "replicas": 0
            "loki":
              "commonConfig":
                "replication_factor": 1
              "compactor":
                "delete_request_store": "gcs"
                "retention_delete_delay": "2h"
                "retention_delete_worker_count": 150
                "retention_enabled": true
                "working_directory": "/tmp/retention"
              "image":
                "registry": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1"
                "repository": "grafana/loki"
                "tag": "3.4.2"
              "ingester":
                "chunk_encoding": "snappy"
              "limits_config":
                "allow_structured_metadata": true
                "max_query_lookback": "720h"
                "retention_period": "720h"
                "volume_enabled": true
              "pattern_ingestor":
                "enabled": true
              "schemaConfig":
                "configs":
                - "chunks":
                    "period": "24h"
                    "prefix": "loki_chunks_"
                  "from": "2025-01-01"
                  "index":
                    "period": "24h"
                    "prefix": "loki_index_"
                  "object_store": "gcs"
                  "schema": "v13"
                  "store": "tsdb"
              "storage":
                "bucketNames":
                  "chunks": "sb-tdv-loki-dev-mec1"
                "gcs":
                  "chunkBufferSize": 0
                  "enableHttp2": true
                  "requestTimeout": "0s"
                "object_storage":
                  "bucket_name": "sb-tdv-loki-dev-mec1"
                  "service_account": "tdv-loki-dev@mcit-tdv-dev-spoke.iam.gserviceaccount.com"
                "type": "gcs"
              "tracing":
                "enabled": true
            "lokiCanary":
              "image":
                "registry": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1"
                "repository": "grafana/loki-canary"
                "tag": "3.4.2"
            "memcached":
              "image":
                "repository": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1/memcached"
                "tag": "1.6.38-alpine"
            "memcachedExporter":
              "image":
                "repository": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1/prom/memcached-exporter"
                "tag": "v0.15.2"
            "minio":
              "enabled": false
            "monitoring":
              "serviceMonitor":
                "enabled": true
                "labels":
                  "release": "kube-prometheus-stack"
            "querier":
              "replicas": 0
            "queryFrontend":
              "replicas": 0
            "queryScheduler":
              "replicas": 0
            "read":
              "replicas": 0
            "resultsCache":
              "nodeSelector":
                "cloud.google.com/gke-nodepool": "np-tdv-monitoring-dev-mec1"
                "topology.kubernetes.io/region": "me-central1"
              "podDisruptionBudget":
                "maxUnavailable": 1
            "serviceAccount":
              "annotations":
                "iam.gke.io/gcp-service-account": "tdv-loki-dev@mcit-tdv-dev-spoke.iam.gserviceaccount.com"
              "create": true
              "labels": null
              "name": "loki"
            "sidecar":
              "image":
                "repository": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1/kiwigrid/k8s-sidecar"
                "tag": "1.30.0"
            "singleBinary":
              "autoscaling":
                "enabled": true
                "maxReplicas": 6
                "minReplicas": 2
              "extraEnv":
              - "name": "GOMEMLIMIT"
                "value": "3750MiB"
              "image":
                "registry": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1"
                "repository": "grafana/loki"
                "tag": "3.4.2"
              "nodeSelector":
                "cloud.google.com/gke-nodepool": "np-tdv-monitoring-dev-mec1"
                "topology.kubernetes.io/region": "me-central1"
              "persistence":
                "enabled": true
                "storageClassName": "default"
              "podAnnotations":
                "iam.gke.io/gcp-service-account": "tdv-loki-dev@mcit-tdv-dev-spoke.iam.gserviceaccount.com"
              "podLabels": {}
              "resources":
                "limits":
                  "cpu": "300m"
                  "memory": "4Gi"
                "requests":
                  "cpu": "200m"
                  "memory": "2Gi"
            "write":
              "replicas": 0
      "path": "charts/loki"
      "repoURL": "https://bitbucket.org/paladinanalytics/tdv-helm"
      "targetRevision": "argocd/dev"

      "argocd-image-updater.argoproj.io/wordpress.allow-tags": "regexp:dev\\.snapshot\\..*"
      "argocd-image-updater.argoproj.io/wordpress.helm.image-tag": "wordpress.image.tag"
      "argocd-image-updater.argoproj.io/wordpress.update-strategy": "newest-build"
      "argocd-image-updater.argoproj.io/write-back-method": "git:secret:operator/helm-repository-credentials"
      "notifications.argoproj.io/subscribe.on-deleted.googlechat": "devchat"
      "notifications.argoproj.io/subscribe.on-health-degraded.googlechat": "devchat"
      "notifications.argoproj.io/subscribe.on-sync-failed.googlechat": "devchat"
      "notifications.argoproj.io/subscribe.on-sync-status-unknown.googlechat": "devchat"
    "destination":
      "name": "in-cluster"
      "namespace": "dev"
    "finalizers":
    - "resources-finalizer.argocd.argoproj.io"
    "ignoreDifferences":
    - "group": "external-secrets.io/v1beta1"
      "jqPathExpressions":
      - ".spec.data[].remoteRef.conversionStrategy"
      - ".spec.data[].remoteRef.decodingStrategy"
      - ".spec.data[].remoteRef.metadataPolicy"
      "kind": "ExternalSecret"
    "namespace": "operator"
    "project": "default"
    "source":
      "helm":
        "releaseName": "wordpress-dev"
        "valueFiles":
        - "values-dev.yaml"
        "valuesObject":
          "global":
            "certManager":
              "enabled": false
            "externalSecrets":
              "enabled": true
              "secretStoreRef":
                "kind": "ClusterSecretStore"
                "name": "external-secrets"
            "istio":
              "enabled": true
              "gatewaySelector": "ingressgateway"
              "namespace": "networking"
            "metrics":
              "enabled": true
              "prometheus":
                "namespace": "monitoring"
                "release": "kube-prometheus-stack"
          "phpMyAdmin":
            "image": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-image-hub-mec1/phpmyadmin:5.2.1-apache"
            "nodeSelector":
              "cloud.google.com/gke-nodepool": "np-tdv-wordpress-dev-mec1"
              "topology.kubernetes.io/region": "me-central1"
          "wordpress":
            "deployment":
              "nodeSelector":
                "cloud.google.com/gke-nodepool": "np-tdv-wordpress-dev-mec1"
                "topology.kubernetes.io/region": "me-central1"
            "image":
              "registry": "me-central1-docker.pkg.dev/mcit-tdv-hub/arr-tdv-app-hub-mec1/dev"
              "repository": "wordpress"
      "path": "applications/wordpress"
      "repoURL": "https://bitbucket.org/paladinanalytics/tdv-helm"
      "targetRevision": "argocd/dev"
    "syncPolicy":
      "automated":
        "allowEmpty": false
        "prune": true
        "selfHeal": true
      "retry":
        "backoff":
          "duration": "5s"
          "factor": 2
          "maxDuration": "5m"
        "limit": 5
      "syncOptions":
      - "Validate=true"
      - "CreateNamespace=false"
      - "PrunePropagationPolicy=foreground"
      - "PruneLast=true"
      - "Replace=false"
      - "RespectIgnoreDifferences=true"
      - "Retry=true"
      - "ServerSideApply=false"
